title: Ceramic Coffee Mug 12oz White
description: Classic white ceramic coffee mug with comfortable handle. Microwave and dishwasher safe. Perfect for your morning coffee or tea.

title: Stainless Steel Travel Tumbler 20oz
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated stainless steel tumbler. Keeps drinks hot 12 hours or cold 24 hours. BPA-free lid.

title: Cast Iron Skillet 10-inch Pre-seasoned
description: Pre-seasoned cast iron skillet for stovetop, oven, and campfire cooking. Even heat distribution. Builds natural non-stick patina with use.

title: Bamboo Cutting Board with Juice Groove
description: Extra-large bamboo cutting board with deep juice groove to catch liquids. Gentle on knife blades. Eco-friendly and sustainable.

title: French Press Coffee Maker 34oz Glass
description: Borosilicate glass French press with stainless steel plunger. Brews rich, full-bodied coffee in 4 minutes. Heat-resistant handle.

title: Running Shoes Lightweight Mesh Men's
description: Ultra-lightweight breathable mesh running shoes with cushioned sole. Flexible rubber outsole provides grip on all surfaces.

title: Leather Wallet Slim Bifold RFID Blocking
description: Genuine top-grain leather slim bifold wallet with RFID blocking technology. 6 card slots, 2 cash compartments. Minimalist design.

title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones Over-Ear
description: Premium over-ear wireless headphones with active noise cancellation. 30-hour battery life. Foldable design for travel. Hi-Fi stereo sound.

title: Mechanical Keyboard TKL RGB Backlit
description: Tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with RGB backlight and tactile switches. N-key rollover for gaming. Aluminum top plate construction.

title: USB-C Hub 7-in-1 Multiport Adapter
description: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with 4K HDMI, USB 3.0 x3, SD card reader, and 100W PD charging. Compatible with MacBook and Windows laptops.

title: Yoga Mat Non-Slip 6mm Thick
description: Premium 6mm thick yoga mat with non-slip texture and alignment lines. Extra-wide 72x24 inches. Includes carry strap. Eco-friendly TPE material.

title: Adjustable Dumbbell Set 5-52.5 lbs
description: Space-saving adjustable dumbbells that replace 15 sets of weights. Quick dial adjustment from 5 to 52.5 lbs. Ergonomic handle design.

title: Resistance Bands Set 5-Pack Heavy Duty
description: Set of 5 latex resistance bands from light to extra heavy resistance. Great for strength training, yoga, and physical therapy.

title: Stainless Steel Water Bottle 32oz BPA Free
description: Vacuum insulated stainless steel water bottle keeps drinks cold 24 hours, hot 12 hours. Wide mouth opening, leak-proof lid.

title: Laptop Backpack 15.6-inch Waterproof
description: Waterproof laptop backpack with dedicated 15.6-inch padded sleeve, USB charging port, and multiple organized compartments.

title: Polarized Sunglasses UV400 Unisex
description: Polarized sunglasses with UV400 protection. Lightweight TR90 frame. Reduces glare for driving and outdoor activities.

title: Wireless Charging Pad Fast Charge 15W
description: 15W Qi-certified wireless charging pad compatible with iPhone and Android. Slim profile with LED indicator. Includes USB-C cable.

title: Hardcover Notebook A5 Dot Grid 160 Pages
description: Premium hardcover dot grid notebook with 160 pages of 100gsm acid-free paper. Lay-flat binding. Ribbon bookmark and elastic closure.

title: Essential Oil Diffuser 500ml Ultrasonic
description: Ultrasonic cool mist aromatherapy diffuser with 7 LED color modes. Covers up to 500 sq ft. Auto shut-off when water runs out.

title: Throw Pillow Cover 18x18 Linen Set of 2
description: Decorative linen throw pillow covers with hidden zipper. Machine washable. Adds texture and style to any sofa or bed.

title: Scented Soy Candle Vanilla Lavender 8oz
description: Hand-poured 100% natural soy wax candle with cotton wick. Vanilla lavender fragrance. Burns up to 50 hours. Comes in reusable glass jar.

title: Succulent Planter Set Ceramic with Drainage
description: Set of 3 ceramic succulent planters with drainage holes and saucers. Modern geometric design. Perfect for desk or windowsill.

title: Portable Bluetooth Speaker IPX7 Waterproof
description: IPX7 waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 360-degree sound. 20-hour battery life. Floats on water. Built-in mic for calls.

title: Wooden Desk Organizer 5-Compartment Bamboo
description: Bamboo desktop organizer with 5 compartments for pens, paper clips, and office supplies. Smooth finish, eco-friendly construction.

title: Smart LED Bulb A19 Color Changing WiFi
description: WiFi-enabled smart LED bulb, 16 million colors. Works with Alexa and Google Home. No hub required. 800 lumens, 9W energy saving.

title: Stainless Steel Mixing Bowls Set of 5 Nesting
description: Set of 5 stainless steel nesting mixing bowls with lids. Sizes from 1 to 8 quarts. Non-slip base, dishwasher safe.

title: Silicone Kitchen Utensil Set 6-Piece
description: 6-piece silicone cooking utensil set with wooden handles. Heat resistant to 480°F. Dishwasher safe. Non-scratch for all cookware.

title: Digital Kitchen Scale Stainless Steel 11lb
description: Precision digital kitchen scale with stainless steel platform. Measures in grams, ounces, pounds, and milliliters. Tare function.

title: Instant-Read Meat Thermometer Digital
description: Instant-read digital meat thermometer with 2-3 second response. Foldable probe design. Magnetic back for fridge storage.

title: Ceramic Non-Stick Frying Pan 12-inch
description: Ceramic non-stick frying pan with PFOA-free coating. Compatible with all stovetops including induction. Oven safe to 400°F.

title: Men's Classic Fit Oxford Button-Down Shirt
description: 100% cotton classic fit Oxford button-down shirt. Available in multiple colors. Machine washable. Wrinkle-resistant fabric.

title: Women's Athletic Leggings High Waist 7/8
description: High-waist 7/8 length athletic leggings with pocket. Four-way stretch moisture-wicking fabric. Squat-proof. Sizes XS-3XL.

title: Mechanical Pencil Set 0.5mm 3-Pack
description: Set of 3 mechanical pencils with 0.5mm lead. Comfortable rubber grip. Twist retractable tip. Includes extra lead refills.

title: Gel Ink Pen Set 0.7mm Smooth Writing 10-Pack
description: Pack of 10 gel ink pens with smooth 0.7mm tip. Quick-drying ink. Comfortable rubber grip. Great for journaling and note-taking.

title: Phone Stand Adjustable Aluminum Desk Mount
description: Aluminum alloy adjustable phone stand with 360-degree rotation. Compatible with all smartphones and mini tablets. Foldable and portable.

title: Portable Power Bank 20000mAh Fast Charge
description: 20000mAh portable power bank with 22.5W fast charging. Dual USB-A and USB-C ports. LED display shows battery level. TSA approved.

title: Acrylic Paint Set 24 Colors Artist Grade
description: 24-color professional acrylic paint set with rich pigmentation. Non-toxic, quick-drying. Works on canvas, paper, wood, and fabric.

title: Watercolor Brush Set 15-Piece Professional
description: Set of 15 professional watercolor brushes with kolinsky-blend tips. Various sizes from liner to flat wash. Comfortable wooden handles.

title: Sketch Book 9x12 Hardcover 200 Sheets
description: Hardcover sketch book with 200 sheets of 60lb acid-free drawing paper. Lay-flat spiral binding. Perforated pages for easy removal.

title: Folding Camping Chair Lightweight Portable
description: Lightweight folding camp chair supports up to 300 lbs. Breathable mesh backrest. Includes carry bag. Sets up in seconds.

title: Insulated Lunch Bag Large Capacity Bento
description: Large insulated lunch bag with leak-proof interior. Multiple pockets for utensils and snacks. Adjustable shoulder strap.

title: LED Desk Lamp with USB Charging Port
description: LED desk lamp with 5 color temperatures and 5 brightness levels. Built-in USB charging port. Touch control with memory function.

title: Ergonomic Mouse Vertical Wireless 2.4GHz
description: Vertical ergonomic wireless mouse reduces wrist strain. 2.4GHz connection with nano receiver. 3 adjustable DPI levels. 18-month battery life.

title: Blackout Curtains 52x84 Noise Reducing
description: Room-darkening blackout curtains with noise-reducing properties. Triple weave fabric blocks 99% of light. Includes 2 panels.

title: Electric Toothbrush Rechargeable Sonic
description: Rechargeable sonic electric toothbrush with 31,000 strokes per minute. 2-minute timer with quad-pacer. Includes 2 brush heads.

title: Foam Roller High Density 18-inch for Muscles
description: High-density foam roller for muscle recovery and myofascial release. Textured surface for deep tissue massage. 18x6 inches.

title: Jump Rope Speed Bearing Adjustable Steel Cable
description: Speed jump rope with ball-bearing handles and adjustable steel cable. Ideal for CrossFit and cardio training. Ergonomic foam grips.

title: Stainless Steel Spice Rack Organizer 2-Tier
description: 2-tier stainless steel spice rack organizer for countertop or cabinet. Holds up to 20 spice jars. Easy assembly, rust-resistant.

title: Portable Mini Projector 1080P WiFi Bluetooth
description: 1080P native resolution mini projector with WiFi and Bluetooth. 200-inch projection. Built-in battery for 2 hours cordless use.

title: Bamboo Bath Towel Set 6-Piece Ultra Soft
description: 6-piece bamboo and cotton blend bath towel set. Ultra-soft, highly absorbent, and quick-drying. Includes 2 bath, 2 hand, 2 washcloths.
